items.title: Newsmax Executive Named as Voice of America’s Deputy
items.deck: The appointment raised concerns that the Trump administration would try to erode the news group’s independence after picking a deputy who had been at conservative news channels for around 20 years.

items.title: Miranda Devine: The FBI’s repeated non-answers on US terrorism attacks raises alarming red flags
items.deck: The FBI insists it’s not their job to monitor released terrorists.

items.title: Man arrested for murder of mob boss and innocent veterinarian after 9 years on the run
items.deck: The man was wanted by Canadian authorities for nearly a decade after he fled to Mexico, but he was recently arrested by Mexican authorities and Canadian police are seeking his extradition.

items.title: Two Iranian men have been charged by counter terror police after 'spy ring plot to target Jews in London' was uncovered
items.deck: Nematollah Shahsavani, 40, and Alireza Farasati, 22, were charged under the National Security Act on Wednesday.

items.title: The $1 superfood that slashes weight like Ozempic, improves heart health and lowers cancer risk
items.deck: Increasing focus has been placed on fiber, protein and antioxidants.

items.title: Revealed - English cricket is running out of BALLS: Inside the 'major crisis' that has left England and counties with HALF the number they need and the frantic plan to find a fix as Middle East war causes havoc - 'it's a wake-up call for everybody'
items.deck: 'If only I'd known this was going to happen, I'd have had a word with Donald Trump,' says the owner of the company that makes Dukes balls.

items.title: Gulf states battle to shoot down Iranian missiles as Tehran blitzes oil and gas plants - causing 'extensive damage' to world's biggest in Qatar - sending price of crude SOARING as Putin breaks silence on assassination of his 'friend' Larijani - RECAP
items.deck: RECAP: Have a read through the Daily Mail's coverage of the US-Israel war with Iran as the conflict entered its 19th day and Tehran vowed revenge after the killing of security chief Ali Larijani.
